summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Timeline de Auditoria Visual feature. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%) and all 8 frontend features verified (100%). Fixed minor issue with action label mapping (CRIACAO and ATUALIZACAO_STATUS were not mapped to human-readable labels).

minor.issue: Action labels CRIACAO and ATUALIZACAO_STATUS were not mapped to human-readable labels - FIXED

seed_data_creation: Used existing pedidos for testing. Status change test created audit events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Timeline de Auditoria feature is fully functional. The component renders on pedido detail page at /assistente/pedido/{id}. Backend endpoint /api/pedidos/{id}/timeline returns all required fields.

frontend_tests.timeline_component_renders: PASS - TimelineAuditoria component found with data-testid
frontend_tests.timeline_shows_events: PASS - Shows 2 events for test pedido
frontend_tests.timeline_shows_colored_icons: PASS - Blue plus icon for creation, yellow refresh for status change
frontend_tests.timeline_shows_details: PASS - Shows 'De Pendente para Em Analise' for status change

verified_endpoints.GET /api/pedidos/{id}/timeline: Returns timeline with pedido_id, numero_protocolo, total_eventos, and timeline array

timeline.acao_label: Human-readable label (Solicitação Criada, Status Alterado, etc.)
timeline.icon: Icon name (plus, refresh, check, x, file, download, circle)
timeline.color: Color name (blue, green, yellow, orange, red, gray)
timeline.usuario_id: User UUID who performed the action

fixes_applied.action_label_mapping: Added CRIACAO and ATUALIZACAO_STATUS to ACOES_LABELS mapping in server.py (line 726-736)
